emails.subject: Revised Coal and Ash Agreements
emails.body: Revised Coal and Ash Agreements Heather, Attached are the clean and redlined drafts of the revised Coal and Ash Agreements per your notes and phone mail. Please review. By copy of this email I am asking David to review the insurance section in both agreements for adequacy. David The attached are the forms of Coal Hauling and Ash Handling agreement that we would use to contract with Reuse Technology for both the Lumberton Power LLC and Elizabethtown Power LLC. Please provide comments.

emails.subject: RE: Revised Coal and Ash Agreements
emails.body: RE: Revised Coal and Ash Agreements Gerald, One thing, our initial lease agreement with Alamac expires on January 30, 2008. I think we should have the terms of these agreements match the ground lease. I've sent the contract to Ross Newlin for his review as well. Thanks! Heather

emails.subject: RE: Revised Coal and Ash Agreements
emails.body: RE: Revised Coal and Ash Agreements Gerald, Sorry I made a mistake, the ground lease will end January 31, 2009 (not 2008 as in my previous e-mail).

emails.subject: RE: Revised Coal and Ash Agreements

emails.subject: RE: Revised Coal and Ash Agreements
emails.body: I changed the date in the working drafts. Let me know what other comments you have. Heather Kroll/ENRON@enronXgate 05/23/2001 10:25 AM
